task: Replay one owner-approved LLM topic decision as the Scout handoff for the no-write worker chain.
prompt: This is a deterministic replay artifact created from a human-approved topic decision. No live Scout rerank is performed.

proposals.title: GSC opportunity review: Last Z HQ Upgrade Guide — Requirements, Fast Path, and HQ 30/35 Strategy
proposals.source_reference: GSC weekly 2026-05-03: page opportunity and query-page signals
proposals.notes: Reasonable review candidate, but the title/intent appears broad and could overlap with progression/start content; better to monitor until query patterns become clearer. Future trigger: If HQ upgrade queries gain stronger volume or a more specific intent cluster emerges.
proposals.next_step: If HQ upgrade queries gain stronger volume or a more specific intent cluster emerges.
evidence: GSC page signal: hq.html had 12579 impressions, 338 clicks, 2.69% CTR, avg position 7.69.

site_fit.primary_user_job: Improve query-to-page match and first-screen usefulness for `Last Z HQ Upgrade Guide — Requirements, Fast Path, and HQ 30/35 Strategy` searchers.
site_fit.archetype_reason: Existing page is `cornerstone-guide` in the `Progression` cluster; Scout should prefer updating the existing page before proposing new content.

constraints: Use existing page template and navigation patterns.
Treat GSC data as a signal, not proof that a rewrite is needed.
reject_if: The query intent is already better served by another canonical page.
The proposed change would blur cluster role separation.
The improvement cannot be expressed without changing a cornerstone page beyond the approved scope.

backlog_row_preview.notes: Reasonable review candidate, but the title/intent appears broad and could overlap with progression/start content; better to monitor until query patterns become clearer. Future trigger: If HQ upgrade queries gain stronger volume or a more specific intent cluster emerges.

guardrails: Only approved_for_chain decisions may be replayed.
Replay does not approve public copy, patch specs, backlog edits, manifests, PRs, or deployment.
Owner approval remains required before any user-visible content change.

overview.description: Brief synthesis of the strongest content opportunities and why they matter.

selected_opportunities.description: Highest-value opportunities that are worth human review.

rejected_or_monitor.description: Opportunities that should not move forward now.
